node.title: Salesforce SMTS | Razorpay SSE | Uber SDE 2 | Bengaluru (Interview Experience)

topic.title: Salesforce SMTS | Razorpay SSE | Uber SDE 2 | Bengaluru (Interview Experience)

post.content:
**Previous company:** Mid size MNC
**Previous Compensation:** 30 LPA (Fixed including PF + Gratuity) with no stocks and performance bonus
**YOE:** 4 Years

**RazorPay Interview Experience**

There were 3 rounds.
1. LLD: I was asked to design and code a database (1.5 hours)
2. HLD: I was asked to design deliver part of a notification service (1 hour)
3. HM Round: In depth questions regarding my past experiences and some behavioral questions (1 hour)

**Uber Interview Experience**

There were 6 rounds
1. Code Signal: 70 minutes and 4 questions. 1st question was easy, 2nd and 3rd were medium and 4th was hard
2. Elimination Round: DSA (honestly, I don't remember the question but I remember using stack)
3. DSA: In the question I used the same data structures as LRU Cache, but it was completely different
4. DSA + LLD: Again, I don't remember the question but I remember using multiple data structures
5. HM Round: Many behavioral questions. Tip: don't lie or make up an answer instead be honest
6. HLD: I was asked to design the search functionality of an e-commerce platform (the interviewer also asked me to mention the APIs, the path, the request body and the responses)


**Salesforce Interview Experience**

There were 5 rounds
1. Hackerrank Test: 60 minutes and 2 questions. Both were hard.
2. DSA: LFU Cache
3. DSA: Variation of Binary Search (difficult level hard and a few follow up questions including time complexity specific questions)
4. HLD: I was asked to design notification service (too many follow up questions)
5. HM Round: Questions regarding past experience and some behavioral questions
You were asked to design database?
What was the binary search question?
Hey, can we please connect over linkedin:\nhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/anubhav-gupta-100184160/
Hi, would you mind connecting me on Linkedin -  https://www.linkedin.com/in/manish-tomar-dce/\nNeed some tips for the salesforce interview process.
Hey OP, could it would be great to connect with you: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aditya-kashyap/\nCould you please share me some tips and some resources?
Congratulations for the offers. Could you share you preparation strategy and resources you have used for HLD, LLD
How did you answer I was asked to design the search functionality of an e-commerce platform
salesforce smts and no LLD round, very surprising! congrats!!!
Which companies qualify as mid-sized MNCs? For example, is Accenture included?
Can you connect and help me studying?
It\u2019s interesting to see the mix of DSA, LLD, and HLD questions, especially for backend roles.
thank you. could you please share the cloud name for which you interviewed at Salesforce?
